TEXT.BibTeX_citation: @misc{Wiki_tay_Bananarama, title = Bananarama, year = 2025, month = May, day = 5, note = {In Wikipedia [Atayal]}, url = {https://tay.wikipedia.org/wiki/Bananarama} }

S.FORM: == Bananarama == Pins'rux sa kawas tay 1981 quw qutux gluw na pinglgan mqwas kya Igiris. Bananarama hya' ga cyugal quw msbalq balay na msrangi' ka, Sara Dallin, Siobhan Faheyy, Keren Woodward qaniy quw msqun ps'rux. maki sa Cins' Sekkay kirok hya' ga, yaquw Onggak na pzyugi' ruw Sinxalan mqwas sa qwas na Lyuko Unggakquw wal naha siy galiy kyaquw spzyang balay thuzyay tayhuk sa krahu' lalu' na blaq balay pongan qwas na pinglgan na knayril, pinmopuw phtuw qwas na Rekoto' qwas naha' nanak. wal naha' galun uziy qwas na sinxalan mqwas uziy, Top 10 qwas sinxalan qasa ga: "It Ain't What You Do..."(1982), "Really Saying Something" (1982), "Shy Boy" (1982), "Cruel Summer" (1983), "Robert De Niro's Waiting..." (1984), " (1986)", "Love in the First Degree", "I Heard a Rumour" (1987). nanu' squw kawas sa 1986, qwas naha' ka "Venus" wal magal cyanpyong na binkgan lalu' na qwas na lyokokya Amerika' ruw binkgan lalu' maki' tay glang lalu' kya Egiris (UK Top 10 hits). mawpuw qutux quw qwas naha' qwas na sinxalan mqwas quw wal magal binkgan qwas kya Amerika'. Billboard Hot 100 (1983–88), kwara' kin na sazing qwas ka wal mzyup sa binkgan lalu' tay 10 qwas naha' "Cruel Summer"(1984) ruw "I Heard a Rumour"(1987) qasa. byacing sqaniy lga , cyux t'aring lawziy squw 'awsa' naha hmgwiru' squw SenSekay mqwas lawziy, kawas 'nyal ka 2018 lga, musa' tmasuq kya squw kita' Amerika Syuw la.

== Bananarama == Pins'rux sa kawas tay 1981 quw qutux gluw na pinglgan mqwas kya Igiris. Bananarama hya' ga cyugal quw msbalq balay na msrangi' ka, Sara Dallin, Siobhan Faheyy, Keren Woodward qaniy quw msqun ps'rux. maki sa Cins' Sekkay kirok hya' ga, yaquw Onggak na pzyugi' ruw Sinxalan mqwas sa qwas na Lyuko Unggakquw wal naha siy galiy kyaquw spzyang balay thuzyay tayhuk sa krahu' lalu' na blaq balay pongan qwas na pinglgan na knayril, pinmopuw phtuw qwas na Rekoto' qwas naha' nanak. wal naha' galun uziy qwas na sinxalan mqwas uziy, Top 10 qwas sinxalan qasa ga: "It Ain't What You Do..."(1982), "Really Saying Something" (1982), "Shy Boy" (1982), "Cruel Summer" (1983), "Robert De Niro's Waiting..." (1984), " (1986)", "Love in the First Degree", "I Heard a Rumour" (1987). nanu' squw kawas sa 1986, qwas naha' ka "Venus" wal magal cyanpyong na binkgan lalu' na qwas na lyokokya Amerika' ruw binkgan lalu' maki' tay glang lalu' kya Egiris (UK Top 10 hits). mawpuw qutux quw qwas naha' qwas na sinxalan mqwas quw wal magal binkgan qwas kya Amerika'. Billboard Hot 100 (1983–88), kwara' kin na sazing qwas ka wal mzyup sa binkgan lalu' tay 10 qwas naha' "Cruel Summer"(1984) ruw "I Heard a Rumour"(1987) qasa. byacing sqaniy lga , cyux t'aring lawziy squw 'awsa' naha hmgwiru' squw SenSekay mqwas lawziy, kawas 'nyal ka 2018 lga, musa' tmasuq kya squw kita' Amerika Syuw la.
S.PHON: == βananarama == pins~ɕʔrux s~ɕa kawas~ɕ taj **** quw qutux ɣluw na piŋlɣan mqwas~ɕ kja iɣiris~ɕ. βananarama ħjaʔ ɣa ʦ~ʨjuɣal quw ms~ɕβalq βalaj na ms~ɕraŋiʔ ka, s~ɕara *allin, s~ɕioβħan *aħejj, keren woo*war* qanij quw ms~ɕqun ps~ɕʔrux. maki s~ɕa ʦ~ʨins~ɕʔ s~ɕekkaj kirok ħjaʔ ɣa, jaquw oŋɣak na pzjuɣiʔ ruw s~ɕinxalan mqwas~ɕ s~ɕa qwas~ɕ na ljuko uŋɣakquw wal naħa s~ɕij ɣalij kjaquw s~ɕpzjaŋ βalaj tħuzjaj tajħuk s~ɕa kraħuʔ laluʔ na βlaq βalaj poŋan qwas~ɕ na piŋlɣan na knajril, pinmopuw pħtuw qwas~ɕ na rekotoʔ qwas~ɕ naħaʔ nanak. wal naħaʔ ɣalun uzij qwas~ɕ na s~ɕinxalan mqwas~ɕ uzij, top ** qwas~ɕ s~ɕinxalan qas~ɕa ɣa: "it ainʔt wħat jou *o..."(****), "reallj s~ɕajiŋ s~ɕometħiŋ" (****), "s~ɕħj βoj" (****), "ʦ~ʨruel s~ɕummer" (****), "roβert *e niroʔs~ɕ waitiŋ..." (****), " (****)", "lo*e in tħe *irs~ɕt *eɣree", "i ħear* a rumour" (****). nanuʔ s~ɕquw kawas~ɕ s~ɕa ****, qwas~ɕ naħaʔ ka "*enus~ɕ" wal maɣal ʦ~ʨjanpjoŋ na βinkɣan laluʔ na qwas~ɕ na ljokokja amerikaʔ ruw βinkɣan laluʔ makiʔ taj ɣlaŋ laluʔ kja eɣiris~ɕ (uk top ** ħits~ɕ). mawpuw qutux quw qwas~ɕ naħaʔ qwas~ɕ na s~ɕinxalan mqwas~ɕ quw wal maɣal βinkɣan qwas~ɕ kja amerikaʔ. βillβoar* ħot *** (*******), kwaraʔ kin na s~ɕaziŋ qwas~ɕ ka wal mzjup s~ɕa βinkɣan laluʔ taj ** qwas~ɕ naħaʔ "ʦ~ʨruel s~ɕummer"(****) ruw "i ħear* a rumour"(****) qas~ɕa. βjaʦ~ʨiŋ s~ɕqanij lɣa , ʦ~ʨjux tʔariŋ lawzij s~ɕquw ʔaws~ɕaʔ naħa ħmɣwiruʔ s~ɕquw s~ɕens~ɕekaj mqwas~ɕ lawzij, kawas~ɕ ʔnjal ka **** lɣa, mus~ɕaʔ tmas~ɕuq kja s~ɕquw kitaʔ amerika s~ɕjuw la.
